page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.gn5i server family. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, operating at 1.0 thread per core. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with a single P4 GPU featuring 8 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large offers an entry-level GPU hardware profile, balancing a small dedicated CPU footprint with dedicated graphics acceleration. This resource density makes it suitable for lightweight GPU-accelerated workloads such as entry-level AI inference, video transcoding, and small-scale parallel computing tasks that do not require massive system memory or local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large is a GPU-accelerated instance from the ecs.gn5i family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated physical cores, 2 vCPUs, and 8.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes a single P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM, while local storage is absent. Network performance is anchored by a 1 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This instance provides a qualitative balance of entry-level GPU acceleration and dedicated compute resources, making it suitable for workloads such as lightweight deep learning inference, media transcoding, and low-intensity parallel processing tasks.

tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated dual-core processing and a dedicated graphics processor for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: Two dedicated x86_64 physical cores with no hyperthreading
One integrated P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
8.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Suited for lightweight AI inference and media transcoding
